message:
fix(codegen): Fix closure comptime issues and add exception context manager

- Replace AnyCallable with @TypeOf() for closure captures since AnyCallable
  has anytype in its function pointer making it comptime-only
- Simplify capture initialization to pass variables directly
- Add catch_unraisable_exception context manager to test.support for
  testing exception handling in closures
- Fix recursive closure return type from void to anyerror!void to
  support try expressions and error propagation in closure bodies
